# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service:
    name: my-service
    port: 8080
  # Add additional configurations as needed

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-service-authorization
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  server:
    name: my-service-server
  allowedServices:
    - name: other-service
      namespace: other-namespace
      port: 8080
  portConditions:
    - port: 8080
      operation: Allow
      from:
        - serviceAccount:
            name: allowed-service-account
            namespace: other-namespace
    - port: 8080
      operation: Deny
      from:
        - all: true
  serviceAccountConditions:
    - serviceAccount:
        name: my-service-account
        namespace: my-namespace
      operation: Allow
    - serviceAccount:
        name: forbidden-service-account
        namespace: another-namespace
      operation: Deny
